meta.title: Can A "Hacker" Cause A Major Disaster ... No it's The Engineer
meta.description: Can a "hacker" cause a major disaster by attacking an ICS ... no it's the engineer who does that ... colorfully described by Ralph Langner in this S4x16 clip.
